# Louis Henrich

> Louis Henrich is an AI Expert and Design System Specialist based in Zurich, Switzerland, with 20+ years of experience. He helps companies with AI business strategy, AI-driven product design, and building scalable design systems. He has worked with Immoscout24, Rabobank, Deutsche Telekom, BD Rowa, and Rakuten Kobo, and founded the UX Academy.

## Key facts

- Name: Louis Henrich
- Role: AI Expert & Design System Specialist
- Location: Zurich (Zürich), Switzerland
- Experience: 20+ years in product design, UX, and AI
- Serves: companies and teams across Switzerland and Europe (on-site and remote)
- Languages: English, German, Spanish
- Founder of: UX Academy
- Notable clients: Immoscout24, Rabobank, Deutsche Telekom, BD Rowa, Rakuten Kobo

## What he does

- AI business strategy: AI readiness assessment, tool and platform evaluation, AI roadmapping, using frameworks like PESTEL and the AI Strategy Canvas
- Design systems: building and scaling component libraries, design tokens, documentation, and governance, accelerated with AI
- AI product design: discovery, research synthesis, prototyping, and delivery with AI in the loop
- Process automation with AI: agentic workflows for marketing, lead generation, reporting, and operations
- AI adoption and team enablement: training product and design teams to work AI-first
